text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Soft, fluffy, radiant skin with a natural glow."
"A hydration revolution for buoyant, youthful
skin."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What language is this?! And wow, does it reek!
Dammit, I just want to fix my breakout, not deal
with all this makeup BS!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But I don't have time to waste waiting for
delivery. It's best to buy it in person.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not like I'm gathering all this data for
fun. I should be able to use it to find the perfect
solution!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So the components of skin are... which means the
essential component is...
So, the optimal product is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That new lotion, huh? Well, let's do a quick te—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Various unwanted factors have Air Shakur
worrying about the condition of her skin.
